name: skiper-ui
title: Skiper UI Components
description: A collection of modern, animated UI components built with React, TypeScript, and Framer Motion
author: gxuri

items.name: skiper3
items.component_description: Elegant play button with Apple-inspired design and smooth hover animations

items.name: skiper4
items.component_description: Interactive theme toggle buttons with smooth transitions and visual feedback

items.name: skiper16
items.component_description: Stacked cards with scroll-triggered reveal animations and depth effects

items.description: Card stack with gsap and rotate
items.component_description: GSAP-powered card stack with rotation effects and advanced scroll triggers

items.component_description: SVG path animation that follows scroll progress with smooth drawing effects

items.component_description: Music player toggle button with vinyl-inspired animations and audio controls

items.component_description: Minimal theme toggle button with smooth color transitions and mode switching

items.component_description: Multi-layer parallax effect with smooth depth-based scroll animations

items.component_description: Typography scroll animations with letter-by-letter reveals and timing effects

items.name: skiper34
items.component_description: Combined scroll and rotation effects with synchronized transformations

items.component_description: Canvas-based crowd simulation with particle systems and fluid dynamics

items.name: skiper41
items.component_description: Progressive blur effect inspired by Rauno's design with smooth gradient transitions

items.component_description: Coverflow-style carousel with 3D perspective and smooth transitions

items.component_description: Card-based swiper with stacking effects and gesture controls

items.component_description: Inverted coverflow carousel with reversed perspective and unique animations

items.name: skiper50
items.component_description: Single image swiper with focus effects and smooth navigation

items.component_description: Creative swiper implementation with unique transition effects and layouts

items.component_description: Horizontal expand on hover effect with smooth transitions and content reveal

items.component_description: Vertical expand on hover effect with smooth transitions and content reveal

items.component_description: Carousel with clipPath animations using Shadcn UI components

items.component_description: Navigation menu with text roll hover effects and staggered character animations

items.component_description: Interactive mouse follow animations with simple and spring-based tracking effects

items.component_description: Custom hook for creating looping animations with configurable timing and transitions

items.component_description: Apple squicircle effect to any element with the filter property

items.component_description: The famous Gooey liquid effect to apply on elemnts with single line of code

items.component_description: Complex SVG clip path mask with custom geometric shapes and image masking

items.name: skiper67
items.component_description: Interactive video player component with smooth hover animations, modal popup functionality, and custom media controls for enhanced user experience

items.name: skiper87
items.component_description: A top/bottom scrollable fade effects that creates smooth visual transitions at the top and bottom edges. and the best part it doest use any JS or funciton just simple pure css animation

items.name: skiper89
items.component_description: A draggable circular scroll progress indicator that shows scroll percentage with a circular progress bar and animated number counter, positioned at the top of the page

items.name: skiper99
items.component_description: Collection of animated icons with smooth transitions and interactive states

items.name: skiper101
items.component_description: A custom tooltip component built with Radix UI primitives, featuring smooth animations, arrow indicators, and flexible positioning options

items.name: skiper102
items.component_description: A simple debug component that accepts any object and prints it out on the screen, best to debug your code

items.name: skiper105
items.component_description: An auto-scaling input for big number entry. Uses the responsive font approach seen in Uniswap and Wise so large amounts stay readable in crypto and finance apps.

items.name: skiper106
items.component_description: A text input with a custom animated caret that smoothly tracks cursor position using canvas text measurement and spring physics.
